subcodes.first_line: O ye two steadfast and firm servants of God! That which ye had written was perused. In truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده ثابت راسخ الهی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید فی الحقیقه
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
